verses.text: Josiah' tapa Zedekiah, Judah gamah kumpi a suah tungin Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen hi
Topa in kei tungah, “Savun khau tawh a kithuah hakkol bawl in la, na ngawngah thuah in
Edom kumpipa tung, Moab kumpipa tung, Taia kumpipa tung, leh Sidon kumpipa tungah, Judah kumpipa Zedekiah tawh kimu dingin Jerusalem khua-ah a hong pai a kumpi taangmite' tung tawnin thu zasak in
Amaute in a kumpite uh tungah, Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen uh hen
‘Keimah in a lian mahmah ka vangliatna tawh ka khut zanin, leitung leh leitunga om mite leh ganhingte ka bawl a, piak tuak ka sakte tungah ka pia hi
Tu-in hih gamte, ka nasempa ahi Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar' khutsungah ka pia khinzo hi. Gamsate nangawn ama nasem dingin ka pia lai hi
Ama gam a kisiat hun a tun' mateng gam khempeuh in amaha kipan a tapa leh a tupa' na a sepsak ding uh hi. Tua khit ciangin gam tampi leh kumpi liante in amah salin a lehneih kik ding uh hi

“ ‘Ahih hangin gam khat peuhpeuh ahih kei leh kumpi khat peuhpeuh in Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar' na semloin, Babylon kumpipa' hakkol a ngawngah a puak kei leh, amah ka ukcipsak mateng namsau tawh, kialpi tawh, pulnatna tawh tua gam gim ka pia ding hi, Topa in kong ci hi
Tua ahih manin Babylon kumpipa' na sem kei un, ci-a note kiangah a hong gen na kamsangte uh, na aisan theite uh, na mang man theite uh, leh na mangsan theite uh' thugennate um kei un

Bang hang hiam cih leh note' kianga hong gen uh thu pen zuauthu hi a, tua hangin na gam uh panin gamlapi-ah note hong kipai khiatpih ding hi. Keimah in note kong hawlkhia ding a, note na si ding uh hi
Ahih hangin Babylon kumpipa' hakkol pua a, ama na a sem gam pen, lo kho-in a ten'theihna dingin ama gamsung mahah ka omsak ding hi, ci-in Topa in hong gen hi,’ ci-in gen uh hen,” hong ci hi
Judah kumpipa Zedekiah kiangah zong tua bangmahin ka gen a, “Na nuntak theihna dingin Babylon kumpipa' hakkol pua in
Bang hangin namsau tawh, kialpi tawh, pulnatna tawh nang leh na mite si ding uh ahi hiam? Babylon kumpipa' na a semlo gam khat peuhpeuh tuaci sih ding, ci-in Topa in a gen hi
Babylon kumpipa' na sem kei un, ci-in note' kianga hong gen kamsangte' thugennate um kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note' kianga hong gen uh thu pen zuauthu ahi hi

Topa in kong cihin-ah, ‘Keimah in amaute ka sawl kei hi. Ahih hangin amaute in kei' min tawh a manlopi-in thu hilh uh a, tua hangin note leh note' kiangah thu hong hilh kamsangte kong sawlkhia khawm ding a, na si ding uh hi,’ ci hi,” ci-in ka gen hi

Tua ciangin siampite leh hih mi khempeuhte' kiangah, “ Topa in hong genin-ah, ‘En un, Babylon khua panin Topa' biakinn beelte kila kik baih ta ding hi,’ ci-in note' kiangah na kamsangte uh' hong thugente um kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah hong gen uh thu pen zuauthu ahi hi
Amau' thu na mang kei un. Na nuntak theihna dingun Babylon kumpipa' na na semzaw un. Bang hangin hih khuapi gam simtham suak laizang ding ahi hiam

Amaute kamsang taktak ahih uh a, Topa in ka hopih taktak ahih uh leh, Topa' biakinnpi sung, Judah kumpipa' innsung, leh Jerusalem khuasungah a kinusia lai beelte Babylon khua-ah a kipuakkhiat nawnlohna dingin Vanglian Topa kiangah hong thum uh hen

“Bang hang hiam cih leh, Jehoiakim' tapa Judah kumpi Jehoiakhin leh, Judah gam leh Jerusalem khua-a kumpi ulian khempeuh Jerusalem khua pan Babylon khua-ah Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in sal dingin a paikhiat-pih laitakin, a nusiatlai khuampite, tuikuangpite, a kingaknate, leh hih khuapi sungah a kinusia lai beelte tawh kisai-in ahi a
Topa' biakinnpi sung, Judah kumpipa' innsung, leh Jerusalem khuasungah a kinusia lai beelte tawh kisai-in ahi zongin Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in a genin-ah
Tuate Babylon khua-ah kipuakhia ding a, ka kankik mateng tua lai-ah a omsuak ding hi. Tua khit ciangin tuate ka lakik ding a, hih munah ka koihkik ding hi, Topa in hong ci hi,” ci-in ka gen hi.
